0.text: Paraseptal emphysematous changes in the posterior segments of the superior segments of the lower lobes of both lungs

1.text: Passive atelectatic changes in the medial segment of the right middle lobe

2.text: Pleuroparenchymal fibroatelectatic changes in the inferior lingular segment of the left upper lobe

3.text: Segmental and subsegmental peribronchial thickening in both lungs
